Short CV

After working in the field of public relations and corporate communication for about 7 years in the unit for clients and agency, he has worked as a faculty member at İstanbul Aydın University, Department of Public Relations and Publicity since 2010  . Becan, who received the title of associate professor in the field of Advertising in 2023, works at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Communication, Department of Advertising.
